parameters.formDescription: Upload your resume and job description to get an instant fit score and feedback.

parameters.text:
=Extract structured information from this resume.

Resume:
{{ $json.resume }}

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "candidate_name": "",
  "total_experience_years": 0,
  "education": ["degree - institution"],
  "technical_skills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "soft_skills": ["skill1"],
  "previous_roles": ["role at company"],
  "certifications": []
}

REMEMBER: Start your response with { and end with }. Nothing else.

=Extract the requirements from this job description.

Job Description:
{{ $('Input Validator').item.json.jd }}

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "role_title": "",
  "required_skills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "preferred_skills": ["skill1"],
  "minimum_experience_years": 0,
  "education_requirement": "",
  "key_responsibilities": ["responsibility1"]
}

REMEMBER: Start your response with { and end with }. Nothing else.

=Compare this candidate resume against the job requirements and score the fit.

Resume Data:
{{ $('Resume Extractor Agent').item.json.output }}

Job Requirements:
{{ $('JD Analyzer Agent').item.json.output }}

Scoring rules:
- 70 to 100: Strong Fit
- 40 to 69: Medium Fit
- 0 to 39: Weak Fit

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "score": 72,
  "fit_category": "Medium Fit",
  "matched_skills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "missing_skills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "experience_match": "Meets requirement",
  "education_match": "Meets",
  "strengths": ["strength1", "strength2"],
  "gaps": ["gap1", "gap2"]
}

REMEMBER: Start your response with { and end with }. Nothing else.

=You are a career advisor. Generate specific, actionable feedback for this candidate.

Fit Analysis:
{{ $('Fit Scorer Agent').item.json.output }}

Fit Category: {{ JSON.parse($('Fit Scorer Agent').item.json.output).fit_category }}

Tailor feedback based on category:
- Strong Fit: How to stand out, tailor resume for this role, interview prep tips
- Medium Fit: Top 3 gaps to address urgently, quick wins to improve fit score
- Weak Fit: Honest assessment of the gap, what skills to build, whether to apply now

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "verdict": "one sentence overall verdict",
  "top_recommendations": [
    "specific action 1",
    "specific action 2",
    "specific action 3"
  ],
  "resume_improvements": ["improvement 1", "improvement 2"],
  "skills_to_develop": ["skill 1", "skill 2"],
  "encouragement": "one motivating sentence"
}

REMEMBER: Start your response with { and end with }. Nothing else.
